evals.prompt: Audit https://example.com/blog/best-crm-tips for Google AI Overviews readiness and tell me what to fix first.
evals.expected_output: A prioritized AI Search/SEO audit that gathers page evidence, focuses on helpful non-commodity content and technical eligibility, and avoids promising AI Overview inclusion.

evals.prompt: Should we create llms.txt and hundreds of question pages for every AI Mode fan-out query in our niche?
evals.expected_output: A tactic review that rejects llms.txt as unnecessary for Google AI Search, warns against scaled content abuse, and recommends people-first content improvements instead.

evals.prompt: Review this ecommerce category plan for AI search: product feeds, schema, buying guides, and AI-written summaries.
evals.expected_output: A structured review covering Merchant Center/product data, useful content, structured data as supporting SEO rather than a magic AI requirement, and AI content quality/policy constraints.
